description: Reduced sigil catalog. Dummy* entries are removed. Numbered families keep only V+; unnumbered families keep the + version when present, otherwise the base version. Duplicate display names are collapsed by keeping the highest/latest GEEN internal ID variant. Names are unchanged. Final audit filled missing hashes and trait max levels from local GBFRDataTools IDs and skill_status.tbl.
